stance: Risk-on within theme: rotate hard from signal-dead legacy auto mega-caps into momentum + rising-revision industrials/auto-tech leaders.
experience_note: No prior round to grade (last_round_review is null), so I am pre-registering what I am watching. This is a high-conviction rotation OUT of large legacy OEMs/commodity-cyclicals and INTO smaller industrials + auto-tech with strong momentum and rising revisions, so my two live risks are: (1) a sharp momentum REVERSAL / risk-off rotation where the crowded high-momentum small/mid industrials sell off hardest and the defensive mega-cap autos I trimmed outperform — I would see this as my high-momentum sleeve (MTARTECH, ATLANTAELE, TDPOWERSYS, AVALON, WELCORP) underperforming the NIFTY 500 together while M&M/MARUTI/EICHERMOT hold up; (2) the rising-revision names being late-cycle revision peaks that roll over. What would change my mind: if next round my added momentum/revision leaders show falling revisions AND negative active return as a group, I cut the momentum tilt and re-broaden toward the structural-quality sleeve. I am deliberately NOT chasing the extreme cheapness z-scores (ORKLAINDIA, MEESHO, APOLLO, QUESS) because in a momentum-led book those read as fresh-listing/data artifacts, not value I trust.
